m#matrix_to_atom[a, 4, -6, b, c, -1, d]
   ~~> index_to_bubble ([("Bubble", 6000)])
{SafeIndex(m#matrix_to_atom,[a, 4, -6, b, c, -1, d]) @ and([__inDomain(a,int(1..3)),__inDomain(b,int(2..4)),__inDomain(c,int(1..3)),__inDomain(d,int(-2..1));int(1..)])}

--

{SafeIndex(m#matrix_to_atom,[a, 4, -6, b, c, -1, d]) @ and([__inDomain(a,int(1..3)),__inDomain(b,int(2..4)),__inDomain(c,int(1..3)),__inDomain(d,int(-2..1));int(1..)])} = 5
   ~~> bubble_up ([("Bubble", 8800)])
{SafeIndex(m#matrix_to_atom,[a, 4, -6, b, c, -1, d]) = 5 @ and([__inDomain(a,int(1..3)),__inDomain(b,int(2..4)),__inDomain(c,int(1..3)),__inDomain(d,int(-2..1));int(1..)])}

--

{SafeIndex(m#matrix_to_atom,[a, 4, -6, b, c, -1, d]) = 5 @ and([__inDomain(a,int(1..3)),__inDomain(b,int(2..4)),__inDomain(c,int(1..3)),__inDomain(d,int(-2..1));int(1..)])}
   ~~> expand_bubble ([("Bubble", 8900)])
and([SafeIndex(m#matrix_to_atom,[a, 4, -6, b, c, -1, d]) = 5,and([__inDomain(a,int(1..3)),__inDomain(b,int(2..4)),__inDomain(c,int(1..3)),__inDomain(d,int(-2..1));int(1..)]);int(1..)])

--

and([SafeIndex(m#matrix_to_atom,[a, 4, -6, b, c, -1, d]) = 5,and([__inDomain(a,int(1..3)),__inDomain(b,int(2..4)),__inDomain(c,int(1..3)),__inDomain(d,int(-2..1));int(1..)]);int(1..)])
   ~~> constant_evaluator ([("Constant", 9001)])
SafeIndex(m#matrix_to_atom,[a, 4, -6, b, c, -1, d]) = 5,
and([__inDomain(a,int(1..3)),__inDomain(b,int(2..4)),__inDomain(c,int(1..3)),__inDomain(d,int(-2..1));int(1..)])

--

and([__inDomain(a,int(1..3)),__inDomain(b,int(2..4)),__inDomain(c,int(1..3)),__inDomain(d,int(-2..1));int(1..)])
   ~~> constant_evaluator ([("Constant", 9001)])

__inDomain(a,int(1..3)),

__inDomain(c,int(1..3)),
